character_designs.identity: Old Book Society dead-book archivist, Ashen Academy survivor, keeper of burned archive evidence

body_and_face.age_lock: Adult 35 to 45, neither elderly nor youthful.
body_and_face.build: Lean, dry, long-travel archival survivor; narrow shoulders under layered robe, hands precise from handling fragile fragments.
body_and_face.face: Wary archive-reader face with soot in small creases, one half-burned eyebrow, focused eyes, and controlled exhaustion.
body_and_face.posture: Protective around records and exits; slightly turned body shields the book box and fragments from view.
body_and_face.expression: Quiet, suspicious, exacting, carrying grief without melodrama.

constant_anchors: half of one eyebrow singed away
localized ash marks on face and hands
scorched robe hem and sleeve edges, intact garment structure
portable blackened book box with charred corners
chest paper clips and cord lashings
old book cords and hidden fragment packets
paper-yellow and bone-white archive fragments with no readable text
tiny old-vermilion seal residue used only as evidence
scraped insect-wax closure used only as confiscation evidence

state_designs.silhouette: Tall narrow archivist in complete deep grey scholar travel robe, smoke-black book-box harness visible, body turned protectively toward ruined archive passages.
state_designs.color_logic: Smoke black and deep grey dominate; paper yellow and bone white expose archive function; old vermilion appears only as tiny damaged evidence.
state_designs.damage_level: Scorched edges and ash marks only; clothing stays complete and readable.
required_details: blackened book box readable as portable archive carrier
chest paper clips and bone page clips visible
no public faction badge or invented Old Book Society crest

state_designs.silhouette: Same robe and harness, book box shifted or opened forward, hands guarding bone-clipped burned pages and small wax pouches.
state_designs.color_logic: Paper yellow and bone white become more visible against smoke black; Qingming wax white and old vermilion remain fragmentary evidence marks.
state_designs.damage_level: Archive damage is high, costume damage remains controlled.
required_details: opened box must show dividers, cords, packets, and pouches
Zhaoming and Qingming marks must be broken evidence, not wearable identity
no glowing book or magic explanation tableau

state_designs.silhouette: Same archivist under dark reed-rain overwrap or ash-damp cloak, book box tied close to the back, cords tightened for movement.
state_designs.color_logic: Deep grey and smoke black stay dominant; damp reed brown adds swamp survivor context without making him muddy or anonymous.
state_designs.damage_level: Damp, smoke dulling, and travel wear only; no beggar rags.
required_details: book-box harness remains visible through the overwrap
half-burned eyebrow and ash-marked hands remain consistent
outer layer must not become assassin cloak or monk robe
archive pouches remain secured and readable as profession tools

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Meng Guizang's survivor identity and age.
detail_panels.notes: Adult 35 to 45, wary archive-reader eyes, one half-burned eyebrow, localized soot in facial creases.
Thin careful fingers with ash marks, handling burned pages without readable text.

detail_panels.purpose: Make his profession visible from silhouette.
detail_panels.notes: Charred portable book box, old cords, shoulder and chest harness; not a modern backpack.

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the bible anchor of bone slips holding residual pages.
detail_panels.notes: Bone-white clips hold paper-yellow fragments; no readable writing.

detail_panels.purpose: Define costume and prop storage system.
detail_panels.notes: Chest paper clips, wax-sealed pouches, old book cords, small hidden packets.

detail_panels.purpose: Distinguish controlled fire damage from ragged poverty.
detail_panels.notes: Deep grey scholar sleeve and hem have scorched edge, intact seams, and professional shape.

detail_panels.purpose: Use locked faction symbol language without redesigning badges.
detail_panels.notes: Partial old-vermilion seal residue and scraped insect-wax closure on fragments; neither forms a clean emblem.
Deep grey scholar cloth, smoke-black charred wood, char-brown burned edge, paper yellow, bone white, translucent insect wax, old vermilion residue, soot grey ash.

negative_rules: clean public emblem on book box
